summary: Added a reusable permission/tenant E2E script and runbook. The live E2E could not run in the current local environment because the default Devpilot API URL is unreachable.
remaining_risks: Must rerun `DEVPILOT_API_URL=<staging-api>/api node scripts/devpilot-permission-tenant-e2e.mjs` against a disposable staging API before production handoff.
The current evidence proves script readiness and related access-policy tests, not live cross-team behavior in this local environment.
next: S017 can start while S016 remains an external environment blocker to clear before final production signoff.
